zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Pigot於1275年出生在英國爾維拉亞斯頓時，她的父親Peter Pigot41歲，母親Joan FitzWarin22歲。她於1293年與Randulph Barker在英國史洛普爾其其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾謝特德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Pigot于1275年出生在英国爾維拉亞斯頓时，她的父亲Peter Pigot41岁，母亲Joan FitzWarin22岁。她于1293年与Randulph Barker在英国史洛普爾其其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在英国英格兰史洛普爾謝特德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Pigot was born in 1275, in Willaston, Cheshire, England, her father, Peter Pigot, was 41 and her mother, Joan FitzWarin, was 22. She married Randulph Barker in 1293, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1350, in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Pigot est née en 1275, à Willaston, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Pigot, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzWarin, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Randulph Barker en 1293, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Chetwynd, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Pigot 1275 in Willaston, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Pigot 41 und ihre Mutter Joan FitzWarin 22. Sie hat 1293 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England Randulph Barker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Chetwynd, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Pigot è nata il nel 1275 nel Willaston, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Peter Pigot, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joan FitzWarin, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Randulph Barker nel 1293, nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1350, nel Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Pigotが1275年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィラストンで生まれた時，父Peter Pigotは41歳，母Joan FitzWarinは22歳であった。1293年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチでRandulph Barkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチェトウインドで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Pigot(이)가 1275년 영국 체실르 윌라스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Pigot(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan FitzWarin(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 Randulph Barker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쳇w이드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Pigot nasceu em 1275, em Willaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Pigot, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzWarin, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Randulph Barker em 1293, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Pigot родилась в 1275 г. в местности уилластон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Pigot было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzWarin, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randulph Barker в 1293 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности четвинд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Pigot nació en 1275, en Willaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Pigot, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Joan FitzWarin, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Randulph Barker en 1293, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1350, en Chetwynd, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
